category_sources: Official GNU poke page describes it as an interactive, extensible editor for binary data.
source_facts.description says extensible editor for structured binary data.
display_name_sources: Official GNU and jemarch project pages use GNU poke.
docs_sources: Official GNU poke project page links the version 4.3 manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official GNU poke page and GNU Savannah Git page, which give the clone URL https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/poke.git.
tags_sources: Official GNU poke page describes binary data editing and a procedural interactive language.
source_facts.description identifies structured binary data editing.
source_facts.executables lists poke and related CLI tools.
